data.title: Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption implemented to protect user data throughout their interaction.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.3 across all pages and services.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits and penetration testing to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party assessments and in-house security teams.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced user login security through multi-factor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Support for two-factor authentication via Apple ID.

data.title: Firewall Protection
data.description: Robust firewall systems to prevent unauthorized access and attacks.
data.technical_spec: Advanced firewall configurations and intrusion detection systems.

data.title: Data Breach Protocol
data.description: Comprehensive strategy for quickly addressing potential data breaches.
data.technical_spec: Automated alerts and incident response teams.
